title: Operations Executive
description:
* Monday to Friday, 8am - 5pm, Saturday 8am - 12pm
* Location: Bedok
* At least 2 years experience in warehouse management exposure
* Permanent role

Our client is a leading food supply solutions and services provider

Objectives:
To support and optimise daily operations and warehouse within our food manufacturing environment. The role involves coordinating resources, ensuring compliance with food safety standards and maintaining smooth production and warehouse processes.

Responsibilities:

  • Oversee day-to-day operations to ensure efficiency and productivity.
  • Allocate budgets, manpower, and resources effectively.
  • Ensure adherence to company SOPs and food safety workflows.
  • Coordinate with contractors on machinery maintenance and building-related matters.
  • Maintain accurate warehouse inventory and stock reporting.
  • Work closely with the export team to plan import and export shipments.
  • Manage internal and external stock movement.
  • Operations include all functioning departments operational matters within the company infrastructures.
  • Ensure Operations and Warehouse are always in good and highly functional conditions.
  • Conduct daily site walks with Food Safety department QA/QC to check on cleanliness of the facility/site.
  • Handle all dormitory related matters.
  • Perform additional duties and cross-functional tasks as assigned.

Requirements:

  • Minimum 2 years of experience, preferably with warehouse management exposure.
  • Previous experience in the food processing or manufacturing industry is a plus.
  • Handle ERP and WMS system.
  • Strong organisational and planning skills.
  • Strong problem-solving skills and a hands-on approach.
  • Effective communication skills to coordinate with diverse teams.
  • Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and solve operational challenges effectively.

HOW TO APPLY:
Interested applicants, please click on “Apply Now” or email to ref32@stafflink.com.sg to submit your resume.
We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Stafflink Services Pte Ltd
EA Licence No.: 04C4294
EA Personnel: Jason Bong Wee Kiat

postedCompany.description:
STAFFLINK SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED

Stafflink Services is an enterprising human resource provider that offers a wide range of recruitment solutions for companies across all industries.

At the core of Stafflink is a team of committed and proficient recruitment consultants.  With their varies background and working experiences, clients of diverse industries can be assured of competent and personalised recruitment services that go beyond the mundane.

Here at Stafflink, we relentlessly place the interests of both clients and candidates as our top priority.  Not only do we value candidates as our key assets, we also take immense pride in servicing our clients.  By carefully understanding their needs and providing apt solutions, we strive to foster enduring relationships, all achieved with the exemplary service standard that Stafflink has set itself upon.
